heading: Definitions
label: 7951 Definitions
notes: References in TextThis subchapter, referred to in text, was in the original “this subtitle”, meaning subtitle C (§§ 1301–1310) of title I of , , , which enacted this subchapter, amended sections 1361, 1371, 1373, 1378, 1428, and 1441 of this title, and repealed sections 1357 to 1359a and 7271 of this title. children.heading: Base acres for peanuts
children.label: 1 Base acres for peanuts
children.text: The term “base acres for peanuts” means the number of acres assigned to a farm by historic peanut producers pursuant to .section 7952(b) of this title

children.heading: Counter-cyclical payment
children.label: 2 Counter-cyclical payment
children.text: The term “counter-cyclical payment” means a payment made under .section 7954 of this title

children.heading: Effective price
children.label: 3 Effective price
children.text: The term “effective price” means the price calculated by the Secretary under for peanuts to determine whether counter-cyclical payments are required to be made under that section for a crop year.section 7954 of this title

children.heading: Direct payment
children.label: 4 Direct payment
children.text: The term “direct payment” means a payment made under .section 7953 of this title

children.heading: Historic peanut producer
children.label: 5 Historic peanut producer
children.text: The term “historic peanut producer” means a producer on a farm in the United States that produced or was prevented from planting peanuts during any or all of the 1998 through 2001 crop years.

children.label: A
children.text: for the 2002 crop of peanuts, 85 percent of the average acreage determined under for an historic peanut producer; andsection 7952(a)(2) of this title

children.label: B
children.text: for the 2003 through 2007 crops of peanuts, 85 percent of the base acres for peanuts assigned to a farm under .section 7952(b) of this title

children.heading: Payment yield
children.label: 7 Payment yield
children.text: The term “payment yield” means the yield assigned to a farm by historic peanut producers pursuant to .section 7952(b) of this title

children.heading: Producer
children.label: 8 Producer
children.text: The term “producer” means an owner, operator, landlord, tenant, or sharecropper that shares in the risk of producing a crop on a farm and is entitled to share in the crop available for marketing from the farm, or would have shared had the crop been produced. In determining whether a grower of hybrid seed is a producer, the Secretary shall not take into consideration the existence of a hybrid seed contract and shall ensure that program requirements do not adversely affect the ability of the grower to receive a payment under this subchapter.

children.heading: Secretary
children.label: 9 Secretary
children.text: The term “Secretary” means the Secretary of Agriculture.

children.heading: State
children.label: 10 State
children.text: The term “State” means each of the several States of the United States, the District of Columbia, the Commonwealth of Puerto Rico, and any other territory or possession of the United States.

children.heading: Target price
children.label: 11 Target price
children.text: The term “target price” means the price per ton of peanuts used to determine the payment rate for counter-cyclical payments.

children.heading: United States
children.label: 12 United States
children.text: The term “United States”, when used in a geographical sense, means all of the States.
